title: Maximize Win From Two Segments
titleCn: 两个线段获得的最多奖品

testcases.input: prizePositions = [1,1,2,2,3,3,5], k = 2 Output: 7 Explanation: In this example, you can win all 7 prizes by selecting two segments [1, 3] and [3, 5].
testcases.expectedOutput: 7 Explanation: In this example, you can win all 7 prizes by selecting two segments [1, 3] and [3, 5].

testcases.input: prizePositions = [1,2,3,4], k = 0 Output: 2 Explanation: For this example, one choice for the segments is [3, 3] and [4, 4], and you will be able to get 2 prizes.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: For this example, one choice for the segments is [3, 3] and [4, 4], and you will be able to get 2 prizes.
